name: io.github.fusionpacttech/fusionpact-vectordb
title: FusionPact — Agent-Native Retrieval Engine
description: Hybrid vector + reasoning + keyword retrieval with built-in agent memory, multi-agent orchestration, and one-click RAG. The first retrieval engine purpose-built for AI agents. HNSW indexing, reasoning-based tree search, multi-tenancy, conversation memory, and GDPR-friendly data erasure — all zero-dependency and local-first.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (only if using openai provider)

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (only if using anthropic provider)

tools.name: fusionpact_create_collection
tools.description: Create a new HNSW-indexed vector collection

tools.name: fusionpact_search
tools.description: Semantic vector search within a collection

tools.name: fusionpact_hybrid_search
tools.description: Hybrid retrieval combining vector, reasoning-based tree search, and keyword matching

tools.name: fusionpact_rag_ingest
tools.description: One-click RAG: automatically chunk, embed, and index text

tools.name: fusionpact_rag_query
tools.description: Build LLM-ready context from ingested documents

tools.name: fusionpact_memory_remember
tools.description: Store episodic memory for an AI agent

tools.name: fusionpact_memory_recall
tools.description: Recall relevant memories across all memory types

tools.name: fusionpact_memory_learn
tools.description: Add knowledge to an agent's semantic memory

tools.name: fusionpact_memory_share
tools.description: Share knowledge between agents via shared memory pool

tools.name: fusionpact_memory_forget
tools.description: Delete agent memories with GDPR-style data erasure

tools.name: fusionpact_memory_conversation
tools.description: Manage conversation threads — add messages, get history, list threads
